examples: Our two peoples share the same experience of having been oppressed by imperialism.
The executives acknowledge that they try to swing national eating habits to food created in America, but they deny that amounts to economic imperialism.
Roosevelt was determined to destroy imperialism.
The Norwegians complain of culinary imperialism by countries that kill other animals, like lamb, for food.
To take this momentous step, the United States had discarded its historic opposition to imperialism.
